fields.name: krb5Conf
fields.label: krb5.conf
fields.placeholder:
[libdefaults]
  default_realm = CDP.EXAMPLE.COM
[realms]
  CDP.EXAMPLE.COM = {
    kdc = kdc.cdp.example.com
  }
[domain_realm]
  .cdp.example.com = CDP.EXAMPLE.COM
fields.help: Optional. Paste the krb5.conf for this platform's realm(s). When set, services deployed against this context mount THIS krb5.conf (with in-cluster hostname canonicalization disabled) instead of the hosting cluster's /etc/krb5.conf — required when the backend (e.g. CDP) is in a different Kerberos realm than the Ambari cluster.
